name: Intercessor Squad
description: Box of 5 Primaris Intercessor miniatures. The backbone of any Space Marine army, armed with bolt rifles. Multipart plastic kit with multiple weapon and head options.

name: Terminator Squad
description: Box of 5 Terminator miniatures in Tactical Dreadnought Armour. Equipped with storm bolters and power fists. Includes assault cannon and heavy flamer options.

name: Redemptor Dreadnought
description: Massive Primaris Dreadnought armed with macro plasma incinerator or heavy onslaught gatling cannon. Highly detailed multipart plastic kit with multiple weapon configurations.

name: Captain in Gravis Armour
description: Space Marine Captain clad in heavy Gravis armour. Armed with master-crafted power sword and boltstorm gauntlet. An imposing HQ choice for your army.

name: Bladeguard Veterans
description: Box of 3 elite Bladeguard Veteran miniatures wielding master-crafted power swords and storm shields. Premium close combat unit for Space Marine armies.

name: Primaris Chaplain
description: Primaris Chaplain miniature armed with crozius arcanum and absolvor bolt pistol. Inspires nearby units and provides powerful aura abilities on the battlefield.

name: Chaos Space Marines
description: Box of 10 Chaos Space Marines. Multipart plastic kit with a huge variety of weapons, heads, and accessories. Ideal for building a Heretic Astartes force.

name: Daemon Prince
description: Towering Daemon Prince miniature. A mighty warlord ascended to daemonhood. Large multipart plastic kit with weapon and wing options.

name: Abaddon the Despoiler
description: The Warmaster of Chaos himself. Stunning centrepiece miniature armed with the daemon sword Drach'nyen and the Talon of Horus. Leader of the Black Legion.

name: Possessed
description: Box of 5 Possessed Chaos Space Marines. Warriors fused with daemonic entities, mutated and deadly in close combat. Highly dynamic sculpts.

name: Chaos Terminators
description: Box of 5 Chaos Terminators. Veterans of the Long War clad in corrupted Tactical Dreadnought Armour. Multiple weapon options including combi-weapons and power weapons.

name: Ork Boyz
description: Box of 10 Ork Boyz. The rowdy core of any Ork Waaagh! Armed with sluggas, choppas, and shootas. Includes options for a Boss Nob with power klaw.

name: Necron Warriors
description: Box of 10 Necron Warriors with Scarab Swarms. The implacable core of the Necron legions, armed with gauss flayers or gauss reapers. Includes 3 Scarab Swarm bases.

name: Tyranid Termagants
description: Box of 10 Termagant miniatures. Swarming bioforms of the Tyranid Hive Fleets armed with devourers or fleshborers. Fast to build, perfect for horde armies.

name: T'au Fire Warriors
description: Box of 10 T'au Fire Warriors. Elite infantry of the T'au Empire armed with pulse rifles or pulse carbines. Includes DS8 tactical support turret and drone options.

name: Eldar Guardians
description: Box of 10 Guardian Defenders of the Aeldari Craftworlds. Citizen-soldiers armed with shuriken catapults. Includes heavy weapon platform with multiple weapon options.

name: Citadel Base Paint Set
description: Set of 6 essential Citadel Base paints. High-pigment paints that provide a solid foundation colour in one coat. Includes popular colours for Space Marines and more.

name: Shade Paint Set
description: Set of 4 Citadel Shade paints. Specially formulated washes that flow into recesses to add depth and definition to your miniatures. Includes Nuln Oil and Agrax Earthshade.

name: Contrast Paint Set
description: Set of 6 Citadel Contrast paints. Revolutionary paints that provide base colour, shading, and highlight in a single application over a light undercoat. Speed painting made easy.

name: Warhammer 40K Core Rules
description: The complete rules for playing Warhammer 40,000. Contains all core mechanics, mission types, terrain rules, and matched play guidelines. Full-colour hardback book.
